events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday today. He was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Drummer Icon
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From the backbeat of The Beatles to his solo career, his rhythm is unmistakable. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today. He was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Rock God Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! Guitar hero, songwriter, and astrophysicist – is there anything he can't do? What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today. He was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. His energy on stage is still unmatched. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV officially launched, forever changing the music landscape with its 24/7 music video programming. The first video ever played was Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. It revolutionised how we consumed music. What was the first music video you remember watching?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe', which was actually released on August 29, 1994, catapulting the Manchester band to stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns another year older today. That album defined a generation and cemented their place in Britpop history. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on August 15, 1969, attracting over 400,000 people to a dairy farm in Bethel, New York. The festival ran until August 18.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, the Woodstock Festival brought half a million people together for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. An unforgettable moment in time. Which iconic performance stands out for you?

events.title: Elvis Presley's death anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the 49th anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember Elvis Presley, 49 years since we lost the King. His music continues to influence generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur remembered
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of the tragic events surrounding Tupac Shakur. He was shot in a drive-by on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, and sadly passed away six days later on September 13. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Legend Lost Too Soon
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, a voice that shaped a generation. His legacy continues to resonate. What's his most important track for you?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix's death anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after we lost one of the most innovative guitarists of all time. His influence is still heard everywhere. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road'. The album was actually released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' is an album that needs no introduction. On this day, we celebrate its enduring legacy and that legendary album cover. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today. She was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and the voice of The Pretenders. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a compelling solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today. He was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock N Roll Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his brilliant solo work, he's still a force in music. What's your favourite Liam track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine'. The single was released in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine all the people living life in peace...' John Lennon's iconic 'Imagine' continues to inspire generations. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks an anniversary of Apple's revolutionary first iPod. It was officially announced on October 23, 2001, and began shipping on November 10, changing how we carry and listen to music forever.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod arrived? It promised '1,000 songs in your pocket' and delivered a revolution. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962, and the enduring legacy of 007.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling adventures, 007 has been entertaining us for decades. Who's your favourite Bond and what's your top Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of music legend John Lennon, who was born on October 9, 1940. He left an indelible mark on music and culture.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His songs still resonate with messages of peace and love. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
